# Subash Limbu

> Yakthung/Limbu author and explorer. Author of "Tracing the Yakthung." Creator of Shall Explore.

Subash Limbu is a content creator, author, and explorer of Yakthung/Limbu heritage, based across
Hong Kong, Kathmandu, and the UK. His ancestral roots are in the Meringden area of Taplejung,
eastern Nepal.

## Book

- Title: Tracing the Yakthung
- Author: Subash Limbu
- Length: 40 pages
- Subject: Yakthung/Limbu genealogy, the 10 Thum and 29 Thum systems of Limbuwan, and oral
  tradition carried through the Mundhum
- Formats: Paperback via Amazon KDP ($26), PDF via Gumroad, distributed in Nepal via Thuprai.com

## Shall Explore

Shall Explore is Subash Limbu's travel, wildlife, and indigenous-heritage channel, focused on
eastern Nepal and the wider Himalaya. Content pillars: Himalayan wildlife documentation, Limbu/
Yakthung cultural and oral history, and Himalayan adventure and travel.

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ShallExplore
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@tsubashlimbu
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/subillion

## Links

- Website: https://shallexplore.github.io/
- GitHub: https://github.com/shallexplore
